query: sodium vapor street light orange yellow night photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / sickly_cast — sodium vapor street light cast, orange/yellow night tint

response.objective_caption: A nighttime scene at an amusement park featuring a large Ferris wheel with bright vertical bands of green and orange light filling its circular frame, a curved orange elevated track in the lower left foreground, white structural support beams, and dark foliage in the lower right corner against a black sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A nighttime long-exposure photograph of an amusement park where intentional motion blur renders a Ferris wheel as sweeping vertical streaks of green and orange light, creating a dynamic sense of rapid spinning amid white support columns, with a sharply focused curved orange track in the foreground and dark trees filling the lower right against the black sky.
